results.title: Attention Is All You Need: A Systematic Review of Transformer Architectures
results.abstract: We present a systematic review of transformer architectures applied to natural language processing tasks. Our analysis covers 150 papers published between 2017 and 2023, evaluating attention mechanisms, positional encodings, and scaling laws across benchmarks including GLUE, SuperGLUE, and MMLU.

results.title: Clinical Decision Support Systems Using Deep Learning: A Meta-Analysis
Neural Network Approaches to Protein Structure Prediction
results.abstract: Protein structure prediction has been revolutionized by deep learning approaches. This review covers AlphaFold, RoseTTAFold, and ESMFold methodologies.
